reviews.comment:
Lentos...lentisimos.  no tienen ganas de atender. Se ponen con el celular, cuando terminan. Atienden al que quieren y no al que primero llega. No te dan un ticket a menos que lo exijas, como lo hago yo.

(Translated by Google)
Slow... incredibly slow. They don't seem to care. They're on their phones as soon as they're finished. They only serve whoever they want, not whoever arrives first. They won't give you a ticket unless you demand it, like I do.
